note: CoinFLEX paused withdrawals after market stress and counterparty uncertainty.
A reported 47 million dollar debt shortfall became a platform-wide liquidity problem.
CoinFLEX proposed rvUSD as a tokenized recovery instrument with a stated 20 percent yield.
Withdrawals reopened with a 10 percent account-balance limit while the remaining 90 percent stayed locked.
FLEX and flexUSD had restricted treatment during the limited withdrawal framework.
CoinFLEX moved recovery into a Seychelles restructuring process.
A Seychelles court approved a restructuring plan involving creditor ownership and recovery assets.
